letterNodesCrustyCo: Greetings! We're absolutely THRILLED to have you on deck! You'll see passengers with train tickets, and you should seat them on trains. Researchers and volunteers with shuttle tickets go on the shuttle to our state-of-the-art research facility. Please hesitate to reach out if you have any questions. Good luck!
letterNodesBioCo: Biodiversity is so great! Everyone should respect the natural order of things.
A sea lion will kill your family if you don't comply.
